top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS hasKoreanVersion
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE c.asciiName = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
  AND fd.language = 'Korean';

SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS has_korean_version
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data f ON c.uuid = f.uuid
WHERE c.asciiName = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
  AND f.language = 'Korean';

SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS hasKoreanVersion
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE c.asciiName = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
  AND fd.language = 'Korean';

SELECT DISTINCT 'Yes' AS hasKoreanVersion
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE c.asciiName = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
  AND fd.language = 'Korean'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'No'
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM cards c
  JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
  WHERE c.asciiName = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
    AND fd.language = 'Korean'
);

SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM cards c
    JOIN foreign_data f ON c.uuid = f.uuid
    WHERE c.asciiName = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
      AND f.language = 'Korean'
) THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS has_korean_version;

SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS hasKoreanVersion
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE c.asciiName = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
  AND fd.language = 'Korean';

SELECT DISTINCT 'Yes' AS hasKoreanVersion
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE c.asciiName = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
  AND fd.language = 'Korean'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'No'
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM cards c
  JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
  WHERE c.asciiName = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
    AND fd.language = 'Korean'
);

SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM cards c
    JOIN foreign_data f ON c.uuid = f.uuid
    WHERE c.asciiName = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
      AND f.language = 'Korean'
) THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS has_korean_version;

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS hasKoreanVersion
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE c.asciiName = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
  AND fd.language = 'Korean';
